lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Name's Guren, and my friends and I have been chosen to be the new Tenkai Knights. Our mission? To save the planet Quarton, and maybe the whole universe from the evil warlord Vilius. We thought our problems were solved when we revived the Tenkai Dragon with all its awesome power. Then Dromus, one of Vilius' right-hand goons, swiped the dragon away from us. So now, until we can get the dragon back, we're in a stalemate. But you know that won't last long, because in the end, this battle will be rare takeoff.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: That's the last of them. We should report this to Commander Bee. Right. What was that? What? Something just passed by! By the eyes of the Guardians!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Tag! You're

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: it!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Ta-da! Something tells me this is gonna be fun!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: How are

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: you going to stare at those photos? I only like looking at pictures of I'm in them.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: All this time. I've been effort searching, and what do I have to show for it? Nothing.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Let's see. You couldn't find the Black Key on Quarton, and you only found postcards in Europe. So we know two places where the Black Key isn't. I wouldn't call that nothing. Next to nothing, but not nothing.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: Thanks for your support.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Cheer up! I'm sure you'll find it before the next Ice Age sets in.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: I'm getting close. I know it.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: What's the big deal, anyway? We don't need to have the Black Key to beat him. Listen, Ken. I'm getting tired of sitting around watching you hydrate. I think I'll do some snooping around on my own, if you don't mind.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: Go on. Knock yourself out. But one thing. What thing? Don't make the same mistake I did by underestimating him. You'll be sorry, Beni.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Thanks for the tip, but I don't intend to repeat your mistakes.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Hey, Guren Nash. Let's see what makes you tick. I don't get it. He's just a typical boy. There's nothing special about him at all. On this planet,

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: at least.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: On Quarton. Okay, yeah, he's got some skills. Of all the Tenkai Knights, you'd have to give him the edge. But I mean, come on. Gen's still more than a match for him. With all his fancy moves, he's just some dude with an energy sword. I know I could take him. So why is

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Gen so focused on this

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: guy? He doesn't seem so special. Maybe I'm missing something. Maybe behind that fresh-faced exterior, lies some kind of awesome hidden power. Or something. Or nothing.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Oh,

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: well. I've done my research. Now it's time to turn on the Charmin' Person. He doesn't stand a chance.

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: More training? More training? Aw, man. I was hoping to nail the

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: zombie level of Dunesploder 3 today. Well, you're out of luck. We all meet at Mr. White's in an hour. It's tough fitting in everything we've got to do, you know? Homework, training, and Quarton. It's like working three jobs and not getting paid for any of them. What? Do you think you should get paid? It's not a job. We're saving the universe, not flipping burgers, buddy. Says the guy who treats everything like a video game.

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: Hmph. Some of us take it seriously. I'll meet you guys there, and do not be late. Where are you going? I'm so close to beating this zombie level.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: After that whole speech?

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: Well, we've got an hour before we

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: meet up, so I'm gonna go work on my jump shot.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Right. I'm gonna try to squeeze in some homework. Okay, Ceylan. We'll meet at the shop, and try not to be late. We'll have to dock your pay.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Yeah, right. You couldn't afford me. Dude. It's not funny. Oh, you can dish it out, but you can't take it. What is this? Jump on Ceylan Day? Mm

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: -hmm. Target in sight.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Gotcha! Yeah! Hey, uh, you all right?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Sorry. I'm

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: a little klutzy. Don't worry about it. I think that's your problem. My

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: shoe! It's broken! It's missing! I

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: know. Huh? I got just the thing. Wait here. Don't move, okay?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: My house is a few blocks up the street. Hang tight. I'll be back in five.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Wait!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: He's clueless. No boy's ever survived as a species. See? One size

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: almost fits all. How

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: can I ever thank you... for the shoes... and for catching me... twice? Gravity. It can be tricky. Nah, you saved me for sure. That would have been one wicked wipeout if you hadn't been there.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Don't sweat it. After all, you know what they say. Timing is everything.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Exactly. It's almost like it was... like it was fate. Haha.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Well, I don't know. Hm. Anyway, you probably gotta get going. You've got a piano lesson, remember? You don't want to keep Beethoven waiting.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Hm. Actually, I've still got a little time. If only there was a mall nearby. Oh, look! There's one! Let's go shoe shopping!

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: If I'd known we'd be sitting around waiting, I would have just stayed and solved the zombie maze. This

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: is weird. It's not like Guren to be late. You think something happened to him? I just wanted noted that I was the first one to arrive. Not to worry. Unexpected delays can happen, even to someone like Guren. That's what makes them unexpected.

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: Yeah, great. But meanwhile, I could have been a zombie paladin by now. C'mon, seriously guys, am I the only one that's worried? Guren has never been late.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: All I know is that I was on time.

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: Perhaps

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: he was delayed by someone.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Like who?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: A very old friend. Or a charming new one. It's just a thought. I have them sometimes. Man, are all girls this serious about shoes? It's like an all-you-can-wear buffet. Should

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: I go with the blue heels or red flats?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: I

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: can't decide. Which would you choose? Uh,

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: the red ones? She sure talks a lot. Half the time I don't know what she's saying. But she's funny. The tall one over there is Benham Tower. That's where my dad works.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Really? Typical boy. A total pushover. Don't know why Gen thinks he's such a threat. But then, Gen's a boy too. So,

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Beni.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Yes, Guren? The shoes. You

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: should get

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: them fixed. Oh, they're broken. I don't think they can be fixed. Alas. Their time has come. Don't throw them away. Why not? I mean, it would probably cost more than they're worth to get them repaired. So, Guren. Yeah? Can I see you again? Yeah. Mm-hmm. Why not? So, I'll meet you right here. Tomorrow after school. Sure. Okay.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: See

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: you then. Ciao for now. Yeah. Can't wait.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Wow. She's some girl. Too bad about the shoes. It's a shame to just throw them away. What's Ceylan want? Yeah. I forgot. I'm late. I'm really, really sorry, guys. You're late. Sorry. Won't happen again.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Thank the guardians you're here, Knights. We lost a scouting party in this quadrant. Unconfirmed reports are saying the damage

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: was done by a single enemy unit. Why are you so worried about one guy? What's up? Can he be? Oh. I think we're about to find out. Scouter!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Whoa. What happened? When did this become a night game? A smoke screen. Watch out. Stay on your toes. I can't even see my toes. Incoming!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: And they're gone.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Ha! The enemy overshot us. If I had any idea what was going on, I'd be worried. Ravenwolf? Is that you? They just want me. Tributon? Hey! Who's that? Let go! That's mine! Who is that? Huh? Yuck! Gotta get out of this fog bank! Pull back, everybody! Good call, Bravenwolf. Definitely time to huddle up. Follow my voice! This way, guys! Stop squirming! Stop bouncing me around! No more Lime Parfaits for you! They're so good!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Running away when we had just gotten started? So much for the legendary Tenkai Knight. I

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: just don't get it. It's weird. Bizarre. Uber bizarre.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Why are you so totally fixated on Guren? Are you trying to make him your friend? It couldn't be you're scared of him. Cause there's no surprises with this boy. I could take him out without even trying.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: You could, could you?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Mm

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: -hmm. That's... Where

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: is she? Oh, man. I've gotta go soon. Sorry

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: I kept you waiting.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: It's okay. No big deal.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: What do you wanna do? We could go shopping for hats. Or whatever you wanna

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: do.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Well, sure. You said they were your favorites.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: You really?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Went

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: to all that trouble for me?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Sure. I always try to recycle and stuff. You know, to help save the planet.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Huh. That's funny. Cause there's something I wanted to ask you.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Are you really sure this planet is worth saving? Uh... Huh? Sorry. No idea where that came from.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Sounded familiar.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: This guy I know. It's funny. He asked me the same kind of questions the other day right here in this park. Hey, I'm no genius. I just want the world to be a happier place. That's all. You know?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: A happier place?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Yeah. But I've really gotta go. Sorry. No, wait! Okay. Thanks. For the shoes. It was nothing. See

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: you soon. Sooner than you think.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Did you say... Where'd she go?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Like Guren said, we spread out and advance in a wide formation. I get it! That way we're not all stuck in the same cloud of smoke tripping over Toxsa when he falls down again! Something like that. And Phelon might even know where he's going! The point is to get through the smoke screen. But that's just phase one. Once we're in the clear, we'll still have to face this unknown enemy. Whatever it is. Phase two! We go Titan mode! You know it! Uh... Oh, yeah. Guren,

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: it's your plan. You bored with it? Sorry. I was just, uh... Double checking if my plan would work. Now!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Let's do it! Try

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: a jury!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: No smoke screen! How do you do that pretty diagram? Guys! Heads up! Smoke screen or not, it's definitely the same goon as last time.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Pink

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: armor? Are you kidding? I'm not laughing. Stick to the plan, guys! Spread out! Let's move!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Ooh. They actually have a plan this time. Watch

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: out! She's on the move! She! What makes you so sure it's a she? Did we just pull over this? Hello! Pink armor! Some kind of spider web. So that explains what we got tangled up in last time. He or she, this dude chick is fast! Okay! Time to go to phase two! Bravenwolf! Tenkai Titan!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: It's the Tenkai Titan time! Damn, this phase two is my favorite phase. Tributon! Tenkai Titan mode! Activate! The

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Tenkai! It's our turn! Valorn! Tenkai Titan mode! Activate! Bigger's

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: supposed to make you better. Tell that to the dinosaurs! Cause you're about to be history too!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Oh! Definitely female!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Either that or a guy whose armor's too tight!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Ah! Yeah!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Hey! Get out of my face!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah! Yes!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Oh! Heads up! What's

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: wrong with Taiko? It's a long way to fall.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: My name's Venetta, but you won't have to remember it. You won't even remember your own name when I'm done with you.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: That voice

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: is so familiar. Any last words? Hey! Back

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: off, Pinkie! Watch who you're calling small

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: fry! I told you! Get out of here! See? Told you it was fast.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: It's all gooey! Okay! You can pinch! I'll kick you, cat!

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Die, you little cat!

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Behold the legendary heroes. Heroes is more like it.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: If we're ever gonna beat this guy... I mean, girl, whatever. We're gonna have to seriously up our game.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: We're getting our bots handed to us on a silver platter and she's not even in tight mode! So which will it be?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Surrender or more humiliation?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: How about none

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: of the above?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Now,

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: bring it on! Spoken like a typical boy. But that's what you are. Just an ordinary boy. I'll never understand why Dromus didn't finish you off ages ago.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Dromus?

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Well, I'll do what he couldn't.

lines.speaker: UNKNOWN(SPEAKER_00)
lines.text: That doesn't look good. Get

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: out of there! I

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: knew it wouldn't take much to beat him. I don't believe it.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Did you see that? He leveled down from tight mode. So a shot went too high. I saw it. Did he even see me next to you?

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: I've got some news for you and your friend, Dromus.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: I put

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: all my dark energy into that attack. It's true. I may not win every battle I fight, but that doesn't mean I'm beaten. You'll never beat me! Well,

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: luckily for you, I need a recharge. So we'll have to wait till next time to test that theory, Bravenwolf.

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: Can't say I'm sorry. In fact, let's face it. We lucked out.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: So tell me, what happened? I thought you could beat Guren without even trying.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: I was just toying with him. Not trying to beat him. I didn't want the fun to be over that quickly.

lines.speaker: Gen
lines.text: Sure you didn't.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: Guren, maybe you're not so ordinary. That

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: was a little too close, Max.

lines.speaker: Beni
lines.text: I've

lines.speaker: Guren
lines.text: got a hunch. Our job just got a lot harder.
